title: OCI Federated Identity Provider Modified
description: Detects modification of SAML/OIDC identity provider configuration which could enable unauthorized access.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.updateidentityprovider' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createidentityprovider')))
falsepositives: Federation configuration changes by IAM admins
